vocab.meaning: hy sinh sự thoải mái để chạy theo thời trang
vocab.example: In my younger years, I didn't mind sacrificing comfort for style, but now I prioritize my physical well-being.

vocab.meaning: lợi ích về chỉnh hình/xương khớp
vocab.example: I tend to invest in brands that offer orthopedic benefits to ensure my feet are properly aligned during long walks.

vocab.meaning: gây ra vết phồng rộp (thường do giày chật/cứng)
vocab.example: I've had enough of blister-inducing formal shoes, so I now opt for soft leather loafers instead.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (tối ưu hóa cho sự thoải mái)
vocab.example: Modern sneakers often feature an ergonomic design that fits the natural contours of the foot perfectly.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn về cách ăn mặc/thời trang
vocab.example: Footwear is a crucial sartorial choice that can either elevate or ruin a person's overall look.
The responsive cushioning in these running shoes makes me feel like I'm walking on clouds.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ, sự lôi cuốn về ngoại hình
vocab.example: While aesthetic appeal is important for special occasions, it shouldn't come at the cost of being able to walk properly.

vocab.meaning: bền bỉ và chắc chắn (thường nói về giày leo núi/bốt)
vocab.example: For outdoor adventures, I prefer boots that are rugged and robust enough to handle uneven terrain.

vocab.meaning: được đóng riêng/may đo theo yêu cầu
vocab.example: If I had the budget, I would always go for tailor-made shoes that provide a bespoke fit for my unique foot shape.

vocab.meaning: một sai lầm ngớ ngẩn về thời trang
vocab.example: Some might consider wearing trekking sandals with a suit a fashion faux pas, but I value my comfort above all.
